message:
Replace vendored SDK copy with 80-line patch file

Pin ai@6.0.86 and use postinstall script to generate ai-patched.mjs
from the stock SDK + ai-vectorjson.patch. Reduces committed code
from 13K lines to 80 lines and ensures the patch stays in sync
with the pinned SDK version.

files.patch:
@@ -21,3 +21,6 @@ deps/
 
 # Log files
 *.log
+
+# Generated benchmark files
+bench/vercel-sdk/ai-patched.mjs
